mapper.select:
SELECT m.id AS memberId, u.name AS memberName, u.phone AS tel,
ms.id AS membershipNum, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id WHERE l.client_id = m.id AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) AND ( mp.id IS NULL OR mp.gym_id IS NULL OR mp.gym_id != #{gymId} ) THEN 'reservation'
ELSE ms.type END AS membershipType, ms.type_rep AS typeRep,
DATE_FORMAT(mp.start_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(mp.end_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS endDate, CASE WHEN CURDATE() < mp.start_date THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(mp.end_date, CURDATE()) END AS remainDays,
CASE WHEN mp.status = 'expired' THEN 'expired' WHEN CURDATE() < mp.start_date THEN 'before' WHEN mp.end_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN DATEDIFF(mp.end_date, CURDATE()) <= 7 THEN 'soon' ELSE 'active' END AS status,
CASE WHEN ms.type = 'pt' AND CURDATE() >= mp.start_date THEN ms.type_rep - IFNULL(mp.lesson_count, 0) ELSE 0 END AS remainPtCount,
IFNULL(mp.lesson_count, 0) AS usedPtCount,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id WHERE l.client_id = m.id AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) AND ( mp.id IS NULL OR mp.gym_id IS NULL OR mp.gym_id != #{gymId} ) THEN '예약회원' ELSE '정식회원' END AS memberSource
FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.id = ( SELECT mp2.id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp2 WHERE mp2.member_id = m.id AND ( mp2.gym_id = #{gymId} OR mp2.trainer_id IN ( SELECT t.id FROM TRAINER t WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN mp2.trainer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, mp2.end_date DESC, mp2.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP ms ON mp.membership_id = ms.id
WHERE ( mp.gym_id = #{gymId} OR mp.trainer_id IN ( SELECT t.id FROM TRAINER t WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id WHERE l.client_id = m.id AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) ) AND u.is_deleted = false
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ms.type = 'pt'
AND ms.type != 'pt'
AND ( CASE WHEN mp.status = 'expired' THEN 'expired' WHEN CURDATE() < mp.start_date THEN 'before' WHEN mp.end_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN DATEDIFF(mp.end_date, CURDATE()) <= 7 THEN 'soon' ELSE 'active' END ) = #{status}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN mp.status = 'expired' THEN 3 WHEN CURDATE() < mp.start_date THEN 2 WHEN mp.end_date < CURDATE() THEN 3 ELSE 1 END ASC,
CASE WHEN ms.type = 'pt' THEN ms.type_rep - IFNULL(mp.lesson_count, 0) ELSE DATEDIFF(mp.end_date, CURDATE()) END ASC,
mp.end_date ASC
LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id WHERE mp.gym_id = #{value} AND u.is_deleted = false

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id WHERE mp.gym_id = #{value} AND mp.status != 'expired' AND u.is_deleted = false AND DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.id = ( SELECT mp2.id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp2 WHERE mp2.member_id = m.id AND ( mp2.gym_id = #{gymId} OR mp2.trainer_id IN ( SELECT t.id FROM TRAINER t WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN mp2.trainer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, mp2.end_date DESC, mp2.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP ms ON mp.membership_id = ms.id
WHERE ( mp.gym_id = #{gymId} OR mp.trainer_id IN ( SELECT t.id FROM TRAINER t WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id WHERE l.client_id = m.id AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ) ) AND u.is_deleted = false
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ms.type = 'pt'
AND ms.type != 'pt'
AND ( CASE WHEN mp.status = 'expired' THEN 'expired' WHEN CURDATE() < mp.start_date THEN 'before' WHEN mp.end_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN DATEDIFF(mp.end_date, CURDATE()) <= 7 THEN 'soon' ELSE 'active' END ) = #{status}
